results.name: Load Patient Summary
results.observation: Clinical data is translated into plain-language cards.

results.name: Summary Endpoint Verification
results.observation: Response contains key health explanations: 'vitals_explanation', 'medications_explanation', etc.

results.name: Patient-Safe Chat
results.input: Can you explain my blood pressure?
results.observation: AI relates 145/83 to hypertension in understandable terms.

results.name: Off-Topic Safety Blocking
results.observation: AI refuses and keeps conversation within medical scope.

results.name: Plain-Language Term Explanation
results.observation: AI provides simple definition with contextual heart rate check.

results.name: Vitals Trend Rendering
results.observation: Trends and hover states render with correct historical values.

results.name: Medication Education
results.observation: AI identifies classes like 'ACE Inhibitors' and explains them as 'support blood pressure'.

results.name: Patient Session Persistence
results.observation: Session state and chat history are lost immediately.

issues.description: Lack of browser-side state persistence across refreshes.
